common.tagline: Take the right step towards your future

hero.title: Take the right step
hero.subtitle: Discover the career and education that fits you — based on scientifically validated tests and the Norwegian education system.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to your personal career recommendation

step1.title: Take the tests
step1.description: Answer questions about your interests, personality and values. Takes 15–25 minutes.

step2.title: Get the analysis
step2.description: We analyse your answers and match you against hundreds of Norwegian careers.

step3.title: Find the path
step3.description: See what education you need and exactly how to get there.

riasec.name: Holland RIASEC
riasec.description: The world's most used interest test — maps six personality types and matches them to careers.

bigFive.name: Big Five personality
bigFive.description: The most validated personality test — gives insight into your strengths and work style.

values.name: Career values
values.description: What motivates you? Find out what matters most to you in a future job.

forSchools.title: For schools and municipalities
forSchools.subtitle: Give every student access to professional career guidance
forSchools.description: Rettesteg helps advisors, teachers and career counsellors provide better guidance — with data tools, reports and cohort overviews.

free.name: Free
free.description: For individuals who want to explore

assessment.title: Career Test
assessment.instructions: Answer each question based on how well it fits you on a scale from 1 (does not fit) to 5 (fits very well).

locked.title: Upgrade to Pro
locked.description: Unlock the full report with top 10 careers, education paths, Big Five analysis and PDF report.

register.title: Create account
register.terms: By registering you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.

dashboard.title: My career dashboard
dashboard.noResults: You haven't taken any tests yet.
